CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Reflection plane depth – adjust Z distance to the Scenesat triangle
CONTROLS.NAME: z_dist

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Motion blur – blend with previous frame, can reduce noise
CONTROLS.NAME: motion_blur

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Triangle fade – center opaque to edge transparency
CONTROLS.NAME: tri_transparency

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: CRT effect – screen distortion, vignette, scanlines
CONTROLS.NAME: crt_effect

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Bouncing bars – antenna respond to audio hits
CONTROLS.NAME: bouncing_bars

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Denoising passes – higher quality, more samples
CONTROLS.NAME: denoise

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Base color hue – shifts antenna animation color
CONTROLS.NAME: base_col

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Neon grid animation speed – reflection plane movement
CONTROLS.NAME: grid_speed

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Sun vertical position – sun height over the mountains
CONTROLS.NAME: sun_height

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Media transparency – video bleeds through the SceneSat triangle
CONTROLS.NAME: media_leak

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Media texture zoom level – scale media size
CONTROLS.NAME: media_zoom

DESCRIPTION: A retro-futuristic satellite orbits a neon dreamscape, its antenna dancing to the beat. A glowing pink triangle floats above an infinite grid of electric blue, reflecting the cosmic sunset beyond. Media content bleeds through as the satellite rotates, CRT scan lines flicker across the screen, and the entire scene pulses with 80s synthwave energy.
TITLE: Neon Scenesat
